---
title: "S&P Capital IQ Pro"
page-layout: article
---

# S&P Capital IQ Pro

**Provider:** S&P

## Description

Financial intelligence platform providing company, industry, market, credit, energy, and real estate data. Supports investment, corporate finance, and industry research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Energy & Environment, Business & Economics, GIS & Spatial Data
- **Data/resource type:** Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Market Research
- **Access model:** Individual Account Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Market Research

## Access notes

Requires users to register for an individual account. Current Capital IQ account holders can access the platform directly using the S&P Capital IQ Pro link in the upper right corner of the Captial IQ page.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://web.library.yale.edu/access-sp-capital-iq-pro?_ga=2.137089200.1253860179.1681413501-14721893.1681413501)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
